{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":488051,"duration_api_ms":454871,"num_turns":60,"result":"Step 4 완료. 요약:

**구현 내용:**

- **`BookPicker.tsx`** (신규): `useStore().listBooks()`로 책 목록 비동기 로드 후 native `<select>` 렌더. 로딩/빈 상태/목록 세 가지 케이스 처리
- **`DiaryEntryForm.tsx`**: `bookId`를 state로 관리, `BookPicker` 통합, autosave에 `bookId` 포함, dirty 감지에 `bookId !== initialBookId` 조건 추가
- **`BookGrid.tsx`**: 각 책 카드 하단에 `/diary/new?bookId={id}` "일기 쓰기" 링크 추가
- **`DiaryList.tsx`**: `books?: Book[]` prop 추가, 각 엔트리에 연결된 책 제목(`· 제목`) 표시
- **`DiaryEntryDetail.tsx`**: `book?: Book` prop 추가, 상단에 책 제목 표시
- **페이지/하이드레이터**: `diary/page.tsx`, `DiaryListHydrator`, `diary/[id]/page.tsx`, `DiaryEntryDetailHydrator` 모두 books 병렬 로드

**테스트**: 432개 전체 통과 (신규 27개: `BookPicker.test.tsx` 7개, `DiaryList.test.tsx` 6개, `DiaryEntryForm.test.tsx` 3개 추가)","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"b114a97c-5bed-4fd5-832b-c34c9aa810b6","total_cost_usd":2.4320735999999994,"usage":{"input_tokens":656,"cache_creation_input_tokens":118842,"cache_read_input_tokens":5374777,"output_tokens":24801,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":118842,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":423,"cache_read_input_tokens":130795,"cache_creation_input_tokens":161,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":161},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-sonnet-4-6":{"inputTokens":656,"outputTokens":24801,"cacheReadInputTokens":5374777,"cacheCreationInputTokens":118842,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":2.4320735999999994,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"c930eef4-c886-4d6f-84b1-fee24ab01882"}
